title: Notifications - Low battery after unplugging the power cable
scenario: Low battery notification transitions to charging notification when device is plugged in, and reverts to low battery notification when unplugged
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected and has a battery level below 5%.
3. Plug the power cable into the Poly Bluetooth audio device to start charging.
4. Observe the notification displayed in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Unplug the power cable from the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
6. Observe the notification displayed in the Poly Studio Mobile app again.
expected: When the device is plugged in and charging, the app shows a charging notification. After unplugging, the notification changes to a low battery notification.
